caseDetails: The case involves allegations against Mr. Vignesh Raja for damaging the vehicle of Mrs. Kavitha Narayanan following an argument about parking a few hours prior. Supported by CCTV evidence and witness statements, the case is being investigated for mischief, insult, and intimidation.
sectionsInvolved: IPC Section 427 - Mischief causing damage, IPC Section 504 - Intentional insult with intent to provoke breach of peace, IPC Section 506 - Criminal intimidation
personsInvolved: Mrs. Kavitha Narayanan (Complainant), Mr. Vignesh Raja (Accused), SI Meenakshi Sundaram (Investigating Officer), Mr. Arul Mani (Witness), Mrs. Priyanka Devi (Witness), Mr. Harish Kumar (Witness)
defenseSections: IPC Section 95 - Act not intended to cause injury, and causes none., IPC Section 81 - Act likely to cause harm but done without criminal intent.
defenseStrategy: Focus on the lack of intent to cause extensive damage and potential provocation by the complainant.
